JAN: Amber's ace is her Toxtricity. The: JAN: Amber's ace is her Toxtricity. The Toxel it evolved from was a gift from her father.
Unfortunately that's all that's left fro: Unfortunately that's all that's left from him, but we're not talking about that right now.
Don't mess around with it either way, on: Don't mess around with it either way, one fiery guitar riff from it and you won't be hearing things for days.  That goes double for your Pokémon.
It'll blast through your team and quick: It'll blast through your team and quick if you don't shut it down early.
Amber's signature move is called Fever P: Amber's signature move is called Fever Pitch, which acts very much like the move Magnitude.
It has a much higher floor though, so do: It has a much higher floor though, so don't think you can coast by completely on good luck.
Though luck won't save you when Amber is: Though luck won't save you when Amber is super hyped!
JAN: Amber, much like Venam, uses the Co: JAN: Amber, much like Venam, uses the Concert Venue field. I wonder if that's a coincidence, or did one copy the other?
Amber more specifically focuses on boost: Amber more specifically focuses on boosting her already powerful sound moves, wanting to ramp Hype to max as quickly as possible.
At Maximum Hype, her signature move will: At Maximum Hype, her signature move will always hit the highest base power it can, so watch out if it gets to that point.
You can try to lower the Hype to weaken: You can try to lower the Hype to weaken her signature move, but I'm not sure if she would like that much...
JAN: Oookay! So you need some help fight: JAN: Oookay! So you need some help fighting Amber?
Speed and Power is the name of the game: Speed and Power is the name of the game with Amber and her Fire-types, and that tends to mean their defenses are rather vulnerable.
She tries to patch this up with secondar: She tries to patch this up with secondary typings, and buffed defenses through abilities, but those can only go so far.
The field doesn't provide Fire-types any: The field doesn't provide Fire-types any innate buffs, offensive or defensive, so using the standard counters to Fire-types will do well.
If you're particularly struggling, the a: If you're particularly struggling, the ability Soundproof will completely block out Fever Pitch, allowing you some breathing room.
It won't be a complicated battle at all,: It won't be a complicated battle at all, so go all out and have fun!

Amber's signature move is called Fever P: Amber's signature move is called Fever Pitch, based entirely on how hyped up she and her Pokémon are.
The stronger the hype, the stronger the: The stronger the hype, the stronger the move. So in theory you could just crash the party and nerf them, but...
I don't think she'd like that very much.
JAN: Amber uses the Volcanic Top Field. I've heard you're rather familiar with it now, so I doubt it needs much explaining.
Fire-Type attacks and various abilities: Fire-Type attacks and various abilities are empowered on this field.
I'm sure you knew that already... Seems: I'm sure you knew that already... Seems pretty obvious to me!
Anyway, this field can erupt depending o: Anyway, this field can erupt depending on the move used.
Some of these moves include: Eruption, H: Some of these moves include: Eruption, Heat Wave, Lava Plume, Magma Drift, Magma Storm, and Amber's favourite; Fever Pitch.
When the field erupts, take note that it: When the field erupts, take note that it will clear all hazards on the field and deliver a nasty shower of volcanic rock on anything on the field.
Speed and Power is the name of the game: Speed and Power is the name of the game with Amber and her Fire types, and that tends to mean their defenses are rather vulnerable.
She tries to patch this with clever use: She tries to patch this with clever use of secondary typings and the defensive boons the eruptions grant her Fire types, but there's only so much that can help them.
My suggestion is to change up the field!: My suggestion is to change up the field! There's a surprising variety you can turn her arena into.
Once you do that, just handle her how yo: Once you do that, just handle her how you would normally deal with the fast and furious, and her badge will be yours in no time!
By the way, did you know that a while ba: By the way, did you know that a while back, before it was renovated, a trainer out there somehow managed to completely flood the arena and take her Underwater!
The engineers and Amber were pissed but: The engineers and Amber were pissed but they had to respect the ingenuity.

I suppose I cannot complain too much, th: I suppose I cannot complain too much, though. There's good reason for a celebration.
Ah, but I do not intend to stick around: Ah, but I do not intend to stick around for long. I plan on returning to Neverwinter soon.
Martin was absolutely beside himself wit: Martin was absolutely beside himself with worry when I called him earlier.
No surprise, considering how long I've b: No surprise, considering how long I've been gone for.
...Though, one drink to celebrate a well: ...Though, one drink to celebrate a well-earned victory over Team Xen cannot hurt.
